subcodes.first_line: O ye leaves attracted by the fragrances of God! It had been my intention to pen a separate letter unto each one, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات منجذبه بنفحات الله مرا مقصد چنان بود که بهر یک نامه مخصوص نگارم ولی
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment
